heading: Omitted
label: 500l Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which directed Secretary, whenever practicable, to appoint natives to administer the industry, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 1350 Stat. 902
